cases.description: Write content to a new file that does not yet exist. The tool should create the file and return a success message.
cases.setup: Target file output/hello.txt does not exist; output/ directory exists.

cases.description: Write a file whose intermediate parent directories do not exist. The tool should create all missing directories automatically before writing.
cases.setup: None of the directories a/, a/b/, or a/b/c/ exist.

cases.description: Write to a path that already holds a file. The tool should overwrite the existing content entirely with the new content.
cases.setup: File exist.txt already exists with content 'original content'.

cases.description: Write an empty string to a new file. The tool should succeed and produce a zero-byte file.
cases.setup: Target file empty.txt does not exist.

cases.description: Attempt to write with an empty string as the path. The tool should reject the input and return an error.
Write a file containing unicode characters, emoji, and special symbols. The tool should preserve all characters exactly as given.

input.content:
日本語テスト
中文测试
Ελληνικά
🚀 emoji support ✅
Special: <>&"'\n\t

cases.setup: Target file unicode_test.txt does not exist.

expected.file_content:
日本語テスト
中文测试
Ελληνικά
🚀 emoji support ✅
Special: <>&"'\n\t

cases.description: Write a multi-line Python source file. Verifies that newlines and indentation are preserved faithfully.
cases.setup: Directory src/ exists; snippet.py does not.
